titleStmt.title: SII 25.170: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 170. (A.R. No. 170 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Pūmādu-puṇara, etc., of the king.

The details of date of the record viz., 2nd year, Mithuṉa śu 12, Monday, Viśākha are irregular as the tithi and nakshatra in the given month fall on Thursday, 10th June, 1120 A.D. or, if the regnal year 2 is taken as a mistake for 3, then the details would correspond to 1120 A.D., May 30.

The record states that the mahāsabhai of Tirunaṟaiyūr alias Pañchavanmādēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu met under (the tree) Rājanārāyaṇan-araiśu and made a sale of land as iṟaiyili to the Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēva of the temple of Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiya-mahādēva of the above village.

During the 2nd year of the king, the expenditure of the sabhai was spent in excess of the ūrmāviyanda-kāśu (i.e., a tax amount payable to the king) and as further taxes could not be imposed on the village for the deficit amount, the sabhai sold the lands (specified) as iṟaiyili to the Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēva, in lieu of 34 kāśu got from the temple treasury. They have also agreed to remit the taxes on these lands. A number of signatories are referred to in this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī— pūmātu puṇara puvimātuvaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilavat tantiruppatumalar mannavar cūṭa manṉiya Urimaiyāl maṇimu
ṭi cūṭic ceṅkol cenṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi va
raiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari patmarāna tribhuvanac
kravattikaḷ śrīvikramacoḷa devarkku yāṇṭu 2 Iraṇṭu Āvatu midhuna nāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu tuvātadaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vicākattu nāḷ kulottuṅ
ka coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrākiya pañcavanmātevic caruppetimaṅkalattu māhāsabhaiyom Iṟṟai nāḷāl rājanārāyaṇan Araicin kiḻ
(kiḻ) kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟakkūṭiyiruntu nammur siddhiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevarkku Āticaṇḍeśvara devarkkum Akkaḷampiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevarkku Ādicaṇḍeśvara devarkkum nāṅkaḷ candrādittaval Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutta paricāvatu na
mmur yāṇṭu 2 Iraṇṭāvatu Ūrmāviyanta kācukku mel Ēṟṟi mākaā sabhāviniyokam Aḻinta nilamayil Uṭalillāta kācukku Ūril māviyantu varikkoḷḷa Uṇṇāmaiyil Ikkācukkuṭalāka Ittevarkaḷukku Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutta nilamāvatu
pavittiramāṇikkavatikku kiḻakku rājentra coḻan vāykkālukku vaṭakku 4 nālu kaṇṇāṟṟu 2 Iraṇṭāñ catirattilum Ikkaṇṇāṟṟu 2 Iraṇṭu catirattilum vācciyaṉ siddhiśvaramuṭaiyān caṅkaranārāyaṇanum Ivan tampi siddhiśvaramuṭaiyān mā
tavaṉum pakkal sabhaiyomāy peṟṟuṭaiyomāy Eṅkaḷutāyirunta nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai terpokuvatikku meṟkkum tenpārkkellai kāppiyaṉ tiruvaraṅkan ceynilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kāṟaikkaṟpakavāykkālu
kkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai meliṭavāy vāykkālukkut teṟkkum Āka Ivvicainta peruṉānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa › (1/4) � 8 › ṭuṉāl viri › › 4 Āvatu kiḻakku › In nilam Araiyeyaraimuntiri kaik kiḻaraiyum Itil siddhiśvaramuṭaiya
mahādevarkku nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl › 4 nālumāvum Akkaḷampiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevarkku nilaṅkalantavaṟṟāl › � › › Innilam Aṟumāvarai muntirikaikkiḻarai Āka › › 4mā þ kiḻakku 5 vum Itdevarkaḷukku candrādittaval I
ṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu Iddevarkaḷ śrīpaṇṭārattu koṇṭa kācu 3 10 4 þ � muppattunā(l)le mukkāle Iraṇṭu māvuṅkoṇṭu Iṟaiyili cetukuṭuttom Innilattukku cilvari peruvariyum tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimaiyum nāṅkaḷḷe
ceyyakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi Allatu maṟṟepperp paṭṭatum ceyyaRead ceyyak kaṭavār Allātārākavum Innilattukku cempilum kallilum veṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu Iṟaiyili cetukuṭuttom
siddhiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar Ādiśaṇḍeśvaradevarkkum Akaḷampiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar Ādiśaṇḍeśvara devarkkum mahāsabhaiyom . paṇiyāl yivūr karaṇattān mātānamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ mācilāmaṇi nānūṟṟuvannen Eḻuttu vācciyan kū
tta nārāyaṇan sayiñai Ātanamaikku kavi(ya)ṇiyan parameśvaran tiruveṅkaṭavanne(n)ḻuttu vācciyan peṇuvāramutu kūttappirān neḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaviṇiyan śrīkuśaṣṇan karumāṇikkappaṭṭan sidhijñaiyātanamaikku karumāṇikkam śrīkuśaṣṇan neḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāratāyan Ejtopana Iḷaiya tiruveṅkaṭavadevan Ivaiyenṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivenvācciyan parameśvaran citaranen Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ mokiliyaṉ kecavan śrīvāsudevanen Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
pāratāyan kalaiyan caṅkaranārāyaṇanen Eḻuttu kāśvapan nārāyaṇan keśavapaṭṭanen Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
